variants.title: Donaldson P172455 Hydraulic Filter, Strainer | Replaces the Filtrec FS173B7T250
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P172455 Hydraulic Filter, Strainer | Replaces the Filtrec FS173B7T250
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P172455 Hydraulic Filter, Strainer is designed to capture larger contaminants before they enter the hydraulic system, protecting sensitive components from damage. Its coarse filtration capability helps extend the life of downstream filters and improves overall system performance. Ideal for low-pressure applications, this strainer offers durable construction and easy installation. Itâ€™s a cost-effective solution for maintaining hydraulic fluid cleanliness and preventing clogging in pumps and valves.
specifications: Style: Suction Strainer, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 250µ, Outer Diameter: 102.0 mm, Length: 195.0 mm, Thread: 1 1/2" BSP, Δ Collapse Pressure: 1 bar, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 250µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 1 BAR

variants.title: Filtrec FS173B7T250 Suction Strainer
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec FS173B7T250. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the FS173B7T250 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
